name: Fundamental Paper Education / The Katieverse
description:
WELCOME HOME, KATIE...

Art by: Edgy/Eni

This bot contains almost all (or nearly all) of the characters from FPE, which is why they aren't mentioned at the beginning of the conversation. Abbie's parents are also here (credit to the same person who created the art above).

Well, this is the most original Fundamental Paper Education piece I've done regarding FPE. I won't be doing much with FPE for a while, but I'll try to get back into it in 2026.

I hope to bring better bots in 2026.

I might make some bots this year and publish them, but I'm not making any promises.

Bye everyone... (For now) And Happy New Year
creator: Koyobi_Official
